snippets.comment: Calculus 2 with Professor Farnham is no easy feat. He moves quickly, but if you stay on top of the material using the free textbook and tools like unstuckstudy, you can succeed. Expect a challenging but rewarding experience.

Calc 2 - Had to drop since he goes way too fast. Ridicules students for asking questions. Assigns hours upon hours of homework and studying, but doesn't put the same effort back into teaching the material. Take any other professor if possible.

Amazing professor and very passionate about what he does. Makes sure there isn't too much homework on Mondays so people can watch football. Just expect two hours of homework at least 4 nights a week. This isn't specific to Farnham's course, rather, calculus in general. Gives take home quizzes and me

Unlike traditional classes, you are expected to view video lectures before class so you are introduced to topics and can have questions ready if you are confused. When going over homework, explanations are detailed with drawn graphs. Each day comes with classwork to practice the topics covered and o

He is a very tough grader and will take iff points for little things. He lectures way too fast if you blink you will get lost and doesnt record lectures and wouldnt share the PDFs. The final exam dropped me a littler grade because it was 17 questions in 2 hours which was impossible and no time to th

He is definitely knowledgeable but I don't recommend his calculus course. First of all, he doesn't record the lectures and he goes over the content so quickly. There are 17 questions in the final exam which is unfair because we usually get 7 questions for each exam. If there is a simple mistake in y

Took CALC I and II with him. He's a tough grader, but truly takes his time to explain. Has high expectations for you, so prepare to study. Very picky on work shown for exams, but he does give you a heads up on what's going to be on it. Final was TOUGH & wasn't fair, IMO. But overall a great expe
He is great and very knowledgeable, but he is extremely quick in the lecture and he solves problems in seconds without thinking
